final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-layer layout showcasing web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls across a single visual
Subject: must include all UI components:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screen
  - Card components
  - Button components
  - Control widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep-tech dark environment backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere with strong depth and layering — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact accent colors, gradients, and glow ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or hard-surface treatment with strong visual hierarchy — exact surface finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five UI component categories as clearly distinguishable elements; visual hierarchy and depth must be prominent
Avoid: flat, dull, or low-contrast presentation; cluttered illegible layouts
